title: codereview-pass2-sfn-kconfig
description: Second pass: SFN time-provider cross-ref solid, modulo example correct for 0xFFFFFFFF, Kconfig selects now include SCHC and EPOCH_PERSIST. IETF style clean. P4 opinion on adding PHY note (HUMAN if ambiguous). No P0-P2.
close_reason: Convergence after 3 codereview passes per logical chunk (SFN para, example, Kconfig). All P0-P2 addressed; only P3/P4/opinion filed and fixed. West build validated Kconfig/selects (native_sim target); tests/vectors referenced. No dead code. Followed draft/IETF style. Conventional commit created.
